notes:
This work great after a few tweaks. 
First thing you need to do is download the game, BUT DON'T start it yet. We need to go to a folder named _CommonRedist located in:
 /.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Steamworks Shared.

Rename this folder to something like "_CommonRedist ". 
We need to do this before launching the game otherwise you get a
Physx error.

This is because during first time setup,
it first installs the Physx (9.09) located in the game folder, and then Physx (9.12) from steam.
The latter witch is incompatible with Physx (9.09).

Been playing it for about 2 hours so far with a solid 60fps with max settings @ 1440p.
title: Velvet Assassin

notes: Before launching the game for the first time, you have to rename or remove "PhysX" directory located in "$HOME/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Steamworks Shared/_CommonRedist/".
title: Velvet Assassin
